transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the outdoor concert on campus tonight?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. I've heard the student jazz band is excellent, so I don't want to miss it.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the man going to the concert?

questions.prompt: Why is the man going to the concert?

choices.text: He wants to hear the student jazz band.
He is performing in the concert.
He has to complete a class assignment.
He is meeting his music professor.

questions.explanation: He says he has heard the student jazz band is excellent.
questions.evidence: I've heard the student jazz band is excellent, so I don't want to miss it.
